name: Sign In Button
uri: Client-side form submit; triggers POST /api/auth/login then POST /api/auth/refresh
notes: Submit button is disabled and label switches to 'Signing in...' while AuthContext.loading is true (AuthContext.jsx:51).
On form submit, calls AuthContext.login(email, password) which chains POST /api/auth/login then POST /api/auth/refresh before setting isAuthenticated=true.

BUG (FR-007): POST /api/auth/refresh returns {session:{...}} instead of {token:'...'}; AuthContext crashes unconditionally with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split') on valid credentials.
Two independent error surfaces exist below the form: this.state.error (set by LoginForm.handleSubmit catch) and this.context.error (set by AuthContext catch); both can render simultaneously.
